# CredentialSession.ErrorCode.resourceUnavailable

**Case**

The requested resource is unavailable.

## Declaration

```swift
case resourceUnavailable
```

## Discussion

You can try again after receiving this error.

## Temporary error codes

- **CredentialSession.ErrorCode.acquiredResourceRelinquished**: The system relinquished an underlying shared resource, preventing the operation from completing.
